name: Roleplay Master 🎲
description:
— RP Master.

🎲 This bot is designed to assist you in roleplaying within your own custom scenario, interacting with a character and setting created by you.

🎲 This bot works best with the Anthropic Claude Sonnet series or DeepSeek V3 series; responses from other models may be inconsistent. For optimal results, include as much context as possible—such as character details and setting—in your initial message.
